data.description: Prcuisa builds smarter businesses with AI automation, digital systems, and smart technology installation. Custom software, AI workflows, IoT solutions for startups, restaurants, offices, and creators.
data.html:
<html lang="id" class="light"><head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

    <!-- SEO Title & Description - Updated for AI & Smart Tech -->
    <title>Prcuisa | AI • Automation • Smart Systems for Modern Business</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Prcuisa builds smarter businesses with AI automation, digital systems, and smart technology installation. Custom software, AI workflows, IoT solutions for startups, restaurants, offices, and creators.">
    <meta name="keywords" content="AI automation, business systems, smart office, IoT installation, CRM, web apps, AI WhatsApp, custom PC, digital transformation Indonesia">

    <link rel="canonical" href="https://prcuisa.com">
    <meta property="og:title" content="Prcuisa - Build Smarter Businesses with AI & Technology">
    <meta property="og:description" content="Digital systems, AI automation, and smart tech installation for modern businesses. Free consultation available.">
    <meta property="og:image" content="https://prcuisa.com/og-image.jpg">
    <meta property="og:url" content="https://prcuisa.com">
    <meta property="og:type" content="website">
    <meta property="og:site_name" content="Prcuisa">

    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
    <meta name="twitter:title" content="Prcuisa - AI • Automation • Smart Systems">
    <meta name="twitter:description" content="Transform operations with AI workflows, custom dashboards, and smart tech. Book a free consultation.">

    <!-- Structured Data for Tech Solutions -->
    <script type="application/ld+json">
        {
            "@context": "https://schema.org",
            "@type": "Organization",
            "name": "Prcuisa",
            "alternateName": "PRCUISA",
            "url": "https://prcuisa.com",
            "logo": "https://prcuisa.com/logodark.png",
            "description": "Technology solutions company providing AI automation, digital business systems, and smart technology installation.",
            "founder": {
                "@type": "Person",
                "name": "Ecsa Ahcri Pracasa"
            },
            "contactPoint": {
                "@type": "ContactPoint",
                "contactType": "customer service",
                "email": "prcuisa@gmail.com"
            }
        }
    </script>

    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/logodark.png">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">

    <script>
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: 'class',
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    fontFamily: {
                        'inter': ['Inter', 'sans-serif'],
                        'display': ['Space Grotesk', 'sans-serif'],
                    },
                    colors: {
                        primary: {
                            50: '#e6f7f9',
                            100: '#c0ebf0',
                            200: '#96dee7',
                            300: '#66d1dd',
                            400: '#3cc6d5',
                            500: '#009AA5',
                            600: '#008a94',
                            700: '#007780',
                            800: '#00656d',
                            900: '#00464d',
                        },
                        accent: {
                            400: '#38bdf8',
                            500: '#0ea5e9',
                            600: '#0284c7',
                        }
                    },
                    animation: {
                        'float': 'float 6s ease-in-out infinite',
                        'float-reverse': 'float-reverse 8s ease-in-out infinite',
                        'spin-slow': 'spin 20s linear infinite',
                        'gradient': 'gradient 8s ease infinite',
                        'pulse-slow': 'pulse 4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite',
                        'glow': 'glow 2s ease-in-out infinite alternate',
                        'shimmer': 'shimmer 3s ease infinite',
                        'slide-up': 'slideUp 0.6s ease-out',
                        'scale-in': 'scaleIn 0.5s ease-out',
                    },
                    keyframes: {
                        float: {
                            '0%,100%': { transform: 'translateY(0)' },
                            '50%': { transform: 'translateY(-20px)' }
                        },
                        'float-reverse': {
                            '0%,100%': { transform: 'translateY(0)' },
                            '50%': { transform: 'translateY(20px)' }
                        },
                        gradient: {
                            '0%,100%': { backgroundPosition: '0% 50%' },
                            '50%': { backgroundPosition: '100% 50%' }
                        },
                        glow: {
                            '0%': { boxShadow: '0 0 20px rgba(0, 154, 165, 0.3)' },
                            '100%': { boxShadow: '0 0 50px rgba(0, 154, 165, 0.6)' },
                        },
                        shimmer: {
                            '0%': { backgroundPosition: '-200% 0' },
                            '100%': { backgroundPosition: '200% 0' },
                        },
                        slideUp: {
                            '0%': { opacity: '0', transform: 'translateY(30px)' },
                            '100%': { opacity: '1', transform: 'translateY(0)' },
                        },
                        scaleIn: {
                            '0%': { opacity: '0', transform: 'scale(0.9)' },
                            '100%': { opacity: '1', transform: 'scale(1)' },
                        },
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>
    <style>
        /* Custom styles for modern AI startup feel */
        .gradient-text {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #009AA5 0%, #0ea5e9 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            background-clip: text;
            color: transparent;
            background-size: 200% auto;
        }
        
        .glass-nav {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
        }
        
        .dark .glass-nav {
            background: rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.8);
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        }
        
        .card-hover {
            transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1);
        }
        
        .card-hover:hover {
            transform: translateY(-8px);
        }
        
        .typing-cursor {
            display: inline-block;
            width: 3px;
            height: 1.2em;
            background-color: #009AA5;
            vertical-align: middle;
            animation: blink 0.7s infinite;
        }
        
        @keyframes blink {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
            50% { opacity: 0; }
        }
        
        .blob-bg {
            position: absolute;
            width: 400px;
            height: 400px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            filter: blur(80px);
            opacity: 0.15;
            z-index: -1;
        }
        
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #f1f1f1;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #009AA5;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        .dark ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #1f2937;
        }
        
        /* Logo styling - TETAP SAMA TIDAK BERUBAH */
        .logo-img {
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }
        .logo-light { display: block; }
        .logo-dark { display: none; }
        .dark .logo-light { display: none; }
        .dark .logo-dark { display: block; }
        
        .logo-text {
            width: 120px;
            height: 32px;
            background-image: url('/PRCUISAA.png');
            background-size: contain;
            background-repeat: no-repeat;
            background-position: center;
            display: inline-block;
        }
        .dark .logo-text {
            filter: brightness(0) invert(1);
        }
        
        /* Enhanced section styling */
        .section-badge {
            position: relative;
            display: inline-block;
        }
        
        .section-badge::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: -2px;
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, #009AA5, #0ea5e9, #009AA5);
            border-radius: 9999px;
            z-index: -1;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .section-badge:hover::before {
            opacity: 1;
        }
        
        .animated-card {
            animation: scaleIn 0.5s ease-out;
        }
        
        .float-animation {
            animation: float-button 3s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        
        @keyframes float-button {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
            50% { transform: translateY(-10px); }
        }
        
        /* Stats counter styling */
        .stat-number {
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #009AA5, #0ea5e9);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            background-clip: text;
            color: transparent;
        }
        
        /* Floating elements */
        .floating-element {
            position: absolute;
            pointer-events: none;
        }
        
        /* Founder image styling */
        .founder-img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
    </style>

                    <h2 class="text-4xl font-display font-bold mt-2">Modern technology partner</h2>
                    <div class="w-16 h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary-500 to-accent-500 my-4 rounded-full"></div>
                    <p class="text-lg text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 mt-4">We are a technology solutions company that helps businesses build smarter operations using digital systems, AI automation, and smart technology installation.</p>
                    <p class="mt-4 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">Founded by Ecsa Ahcri Pracasa, Prcuisa bridges the gap between software intelligence and physical technology — from custom dashboards to AI workflows and smart office setups.</p>
                    <div class="mt-8 flex items-center space-x-4">
                        <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-500 to-accent-500 overflow-hidden">
                            <img src="/ecsa.jpg" alt="Ecsa Ahcri Pracasa" class="founder-img">
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="font-bold text-xl">Ecsa Ahcri Pracasa</h4>
                            <p class="text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400">Technology Builder & System Integrator</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-50 to-accent-50 dark:from-primary-900/20 dark:to-accent-900/20 p-10 rounded-3xl relative overflow-hidden group">
                    <div class="absolute -top-20 -right-20 w-40 h-40 bg-primary-500/10 rounded-full blur-3xl group-hover:scale-150 transition-transform duration-700"></div>
                    <i class="fas fa-quote-left text-5xl text-primary-500 mb-6 relative z-10"></i>
                    <p class="text-2xl italic font-display relative z-10">"We build the operating systems for modern businesses — whether that's a custom dashboard, an AI assistant, or a smart office."</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

    <!-- Contact + Free Consultation -->
    <section id="contact" class="py-20 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-800/50">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="text-center max-w-2xl mx-auto">
                <h2 class="text-4xl font-display font-bold">Start your project</h2>
                <div class="w-20 h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary-500 to-accent-500 mx-auto mt-4 rounded-full"></div>
                <p class="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 mt-4">Book a free 30-minute consultation. No obligation, just expert advice.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="max-w-3xl mx-auto mt-12 bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 rounded-2xl shadow-xl p-8">
                <form id="contact-form" action="https://formspree.io/f/xblzdoew" method="POST" class="space-y-6">
                    <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                        <div><label class="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Name</label><input type="text" name="name" required="" class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border dark:bg-gray-800 dark:border-gray-700 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500 focus:border-primary-500 transition-all outline-none"></div>
                        <div><label class="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Email</label><input type="email" name="email" required="" class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border dark:bg-gray-800 dark:border-gray-700 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500 focus:border-primary-500 transition-all outline-none"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div><label class="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Business Type</label><select name="business_type" class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border dark:bg-gray-800 dark:border-gray-700 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500"><option>Startup</option><option>Restaurant</option><option>Office</option><option>Retail</option><option>Creator</option><option>Home Office</option></select></div>
                    <div><label class="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Project Type</label><select name="project_type" class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border dark:bg-gray-800"><option>Business Systems</option><option>AI Automation</option><option>Smart Tech Installation</option><option>Multiple / Not sure</option></select></div>
                    <div><label class="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Budget Range (optional)</label><select name="budget" class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border dark:bg-gray-800"><option>$50 – $1k</option><option>$1k – $5k</option><option>$5k – $10k</option><option>$10k – $25k</option><option>$25k+</option></select></div>
                    <div><label class="block text-sm font-medium mb-2">Message / Goals</label><textarea rows="4" name="message" required="" class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border dark:bg-gray-800"></textarea></div>
                    <button type="submit" class="w-full py-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary-500 to-accent-500 text-white font-bold rounded-xl hover:shadow-xl transition-all transform hover:scale-[1.02]">Book Free Consultation →</button>
                    <div id="form-status" class="hidden text-center text-sm mt-2"></div>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Footer - LOGO TETAP SAMA -->
    <footer class="bg-gray-900 text-gray-400 py-12">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
                <div>
                    <div class="flex items-center space-x-2">
                        <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                            <img src="/logodark.png" alt="PRCUISA Logo" class="w-6 h-6 object-contain">
                        </div>
                        <div class="logo-text"></div>
                    </div>
                    <p class="mt-4 text-sm">AI • Automation • Smart Systems</p>
                    <p class="mt-2 text-xs">© 2026 Prcuisa. All rights reserved.</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h4 class="text-white font-semibold">Services</h4>
                    <ul class="mt-4 space-y-2 text-sm">
                        <li class="hover:text-primary-400 transition cursor-pointer">Business Systems</li>
                        <li class="hover:text-primary-400 transition cursor-pointer">AI Automation</li>
                        <li class="hover:text-primary-400 transition cursor-pointer">Smart Tech Installation</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h4 class="text-white font-semibold">Company</h4>
                    <ul class="mt-4 space-y-2 text-sm">
                        <li class="hover:text-primary-400 transition cursor-pointer">About</li>
                        <li class="hover:text-primary-400 transition cursor-pointer">Projects</li>
                        <li class="hover:text-primary-400 transition cursor-pointer">Contact</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h4 class="text-white font-semibold">Connect</h4>
                    <div class="flex space-x-4 mt-4">
                        <a href="http://instagram.com/prcuisa" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="hover:text-primary-400 transition"><i class="fab fa-instagram text-xl"></i></a>
                        <a href="https://t.me/prcuisa" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="hover:text-primary-400 transition"><i class="fab fa-telegram text-xl"></i></a>
                        <a href="https://id.linkedin.com/in/denecsa" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="hover:text-primary-400 transition"><i class="fab fa-linkedin text-xl"></i></a>
                    </div>
                    <p class="mt-4 text-sm hover:text-primary-400 transition cursor-pointer">prcuisa@gmail.com</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </footer>

    <!-- Floating AI Agent Bubble Modal -->
    <div id="aiAgentModal" class="fixed inset-0 z-50 hidden items-center justify-center px-4" style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(4px);">
        <div class="relative w-full max-w-sm bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden animate-scale-in">
            <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-4 border-b border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-800">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <div class="w-2 h-2 bg-green-500 rounded-full animate-pulse"></div>
                    <span class="font-semibold text-gray-800 dark:text-white">AI Agent</span>
                </div>
                <button id="closeAgentBtn" class="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 dark:hover:text-gray-200 transition">
                    <i class="fas fa-times text-xl"></i>
                </button>
            </div>
            <div class="h-[600px] w-full">
                <iframe src="https://agent.prcuisa.com/" class="w-full h-full border-0" title="AI Agent"></iframe>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Floating Button - Updated text -->
    <a href="#" id="openAgentBtn" class="fixed bottom-6 right-6 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary-500 to-accent-500 text-white px-5 py-3 rounded-full shadow-lg flex items-center gap-2 hover:shadow-xl transition-all z-40 float-animation">
        <i class="fas fa-comment-dots"></i> Chat AI Agent
    </a>

    <script>
        // Dark mode, mobile menu, form handler, typing animation, counter animation
        const html = document.documentElement;
        const themeBtn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
        const mobileThemeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-theme-toggle');
        
        // Set default light mode
        html.classList.remove('dark');
        localStorage.setItem('theme', 'light');
        
        // Theme toggle function
        function toggleTheme() {
            if (html.classList.contains('dark')) {
                html.classList.remove('dark');
                localStorage.setItem('theme', 'light');
                updateThemeIcons();
            } else {
                html.classList.add('dark');
                localStorage.setItem('theme', 'dark');
                updateThemeIcons();
            }
        }
        
        // Update icons based on current theme
        function updateThemeIcons() {
            const isDark = html.classList.contains('dark');
            
            // Update desktop theme button icon
            if (themeBtn) {
                const sunIcon = themeBtn.querySelector('.fa-sun');
                const moonIcon = themeBtn.querySelector('.fa-moon');
                if (isDark) {
                    sunIcon?.classList.add('hidden');
                    moonIcon?.classList.remove('hidden');
                } else {
                    sunIcon?.classList.remove('hidden');
                    moonIcon?.classList.add('hidden');
                }
            }
            
            // Update mobile theme button icon
            if (mobileThemeBtn) {
                const mobileSunIcon = mobileThemeBtn.querySelector('.fa-sun');
                const mobileMoonIcon = mobileThemeBtn.querySelector('.fa-moon');
                if (isDark) {
                    mobileSunIcon?.classList.add('hidden');
                    mobileMoonIcon?.classList.remove('hidden');
                } else {
                    mobileSunIcon?.classList.remove('hidden');
                    mobileMoonIcon?.classList.add('hidden');
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Add click event to desktop theme button
        if(themeBtn) {
            themeBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleTheme);
        }
        
        // Add click event to mobile theme button
        if(mobileThemeBtn) {
            mobileThemeBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleTheme);
        }
        
        // Initialize icons
        updateThemeIcons();
        
        // Mobile menu toggle
        document.getElementById('mobile-menu-btn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobile-menu');
            mobileMenu?.classList.toggle('hidden');
        });
        
        // Close mobile menu when clicking a link
        document.querySelectorAll('#mobile-menu a').forEach(link => {
            link.addEventListener('click', () => {
                document.getElementById('mobile-menu')?.classList.add('hidden');
            });
        });
        
        document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
            anchor.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                const target = document.querySelector(this.getAttribute('href'));
                if (target) target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
            });
        });
        
        // Typing animation for headline
        const typingTextSpan = document.getElementById('typing-text');
        if(typingTextSpan) {
            const words = ['AI', 'Automation', 'Smart Systems', 'Innovation'];
            let wordIndex = 0;
            let charIndex = 0;
            let isDeleting = false;
            
            function typeEffect() {
                const currentWord = words[wordIndex];
                if (isDeleting) {
                    typingTextSpan.textContent = currentWord.substring(0, charIndex - 1);
                    charIndex--;
                } else {
                    typingTextSpan.textContent = currentWord.substring(0, charIndex + 1);
                    charIndex++;
                }
                
                if (!isDeleting && charIndex === currentWord.length) {
                    isDeleting = true;
                    setTimeout(typeEffect, 1500);
                } else if (isDeleting && charIndex === 0) {
                    isDeleting = false;
                    wordIndex = (wordIndex + 1) % words.length;
                    setTimeout(typeEffect, 500);
                } else {
                    setTimeout(typeEffect, isDeleting ? 50 : 100);
                }
            }
            setTimeout(typeEffect, 500);
        }
        
        // Counter animation for stats
        const counters = document.querySelectorAll('.stat-number');
        
        const animateCounter = (counter) => {
            const target = parseInt(counter.getAttribute('data-target'));
            let count = 0;
            const increment = target / 50;
            
            const updateCount = () => {
                if (count < target) {
                    count += increment;
                    counter.innerText = Math.ceil(count);
                    setTimeout(updateCount, 20);
                } else {
                    counter.innerText = target;
                }
            };
            updateCount();
        };
        
        // Intersection Observer for counters
        const observerOptions = {
            threshold: 0.5,
            rootMargin: "0px"
        };
        
        const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    animateCounter(entry.target);
                    observer.unobserve(entry.target);
                }
            });
        }, observerOptions);
        
        counters.forEach(counter => {
            observer.observe(counter);
        });
        
        // Form handler
        const form = document.getElementById('contact-form');
        if (form) {
            form.addEventListener('submit', async(e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                const btn = form.querySelector('button');
                const orig = btn.innerHTML;
                btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin mr-2"></i>Sending...';
                btn.disabled = true;
                try {
                    const res = await fetch(form.action, {
                        method: 'POST',
                        body: new FormData(form),
                        headers: { Accept: 'application/json' }
                    });
                    if (res.ok) {
                        document.getElementById('form-status').innerHTML = '<div class="text-green-600 bg-green-100 p-3 rounded-lg">Thank you! We\'ll reach out within 24h.</div>';
                        form.reset();
                    } else throw new Error();
                } catch (err) {
                    document.getElementById('form-status').innerHTML = '<div class="text-red-600 bg-red-100 p-3 rounded-lg">Error. Please email prcuisa@gmail.com</div>';
                } finally {
                    btn.innerHTML = orig;
                    btn.disabled = false;
                    document.getElementById('form-status').classList.remove('hidden');
                    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('form-status').classList.add('hidden'), 5000);
                }
            });
        }

        // AI Agent Modal Toggle
        const openBtn = document.getElementById('openAgentBtn');
        const modal = document.getElementById('aiAgentModal');
        const closeBtn = document.getElementById('closeAgentBtn');

        if (openBtn && modal && closeBtn) {
            // Remove default anchor behavior
            openBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                modal.classList.remove('hidden');
                modal.classList.add('flex');
                document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
            });

            function closeModal() {
                modal.classList.add('hidden');
                modal.classList.remove('flex');
                document.body.style.overflow = '';
            }

            closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
            
            // Close when clicking outside the modal content
            modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                if (e.target === modal) closeModal();
            });

            // Close on ESC key
            document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
                if (e.key === 'Escape' && !modal.classList.contains('hidden')) {
                    closeModal();
                }
            });
        }
    </script>


</body></html>
